classDiagram
  class Customer {
    +String emailAddress
    +placeOrder(orderId) Receipt
  }
  class Order {
    +String externalReference
    +totalCents() int
  }
  Customer "1" --> "*" Order : places labeled orders
---
┌───────────────────────┐
│ Customer              │
├───────────────────────┤
│ +emailAddress: String │
├───────────────────────┤
│ +placeOrder: Receipt  │
└───────────────────────┘
            │
   places labeled orders
               ▼
┌────────────────────────────┐
│ Order                      │
├────────────────────────────┤
│ +externalReference: String │
├────────────────────────────┤
│ +totalCents: int           │
└────────────────────────────┘
